ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "is_senior_citizen" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is a senior citizen */,
  "has_partner" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has a partner */,
  "has_dependents" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has dependents */,
  "tenure" INTEGER /* Tenure of the customer in months */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract the customer is on (e.g., Month-to-month, One year, Two year) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the service (e.g., Phone, Internet, TV) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., residential, business) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plan */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "monthly_charge" REAL /* Monthly charge for the plan */,
  "data_limit" INTEGER /* Data limit for the plan (in GB) */,
  "speed" TEXT /* Speed of the plan (e.g., 100 Mbps, 500 Mbps) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_services" (
  "customer_service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-service pair */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer subscribed to the service */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the service was activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_services_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_services_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_plans" (
  "customer_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-plan pair */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer subscribed to the plan */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the plan was activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plans_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_plans_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bills" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date when the bill was generated */,
  "total_charge" REAL /* Total charge for the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the bill (e.g., paid, pending, overdue) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bills_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn" (
  "churn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each churn event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "has_churned" INTEGER /* Whether the customer has churned */,
  "churn_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer churned (if applicable) */,
  "churn_reason" TEXT /* Reason for churning (e.g., poor service, high price) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("churn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_churn_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the support request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of support request (e.g., phone, email, chat) */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the support request (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the usage occurred */,
  "usage_amount" REAL /* Amount of usage (e.g., data used in GB, minutes used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., upgrade, downgrade, change plan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_updates_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_service_updates_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plan_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plan */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., upgrade, downgrade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_changes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plan_changes_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("plan_id") REFERENCES plans ("plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
